{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva Dec 2024
from decimal import Decimal

# EBITDA = EBIT + Depreciation(absolute)
# EV = market cap + debt - cash
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades

lpa = lucro_12 / shares_outstanding if shares_outstanding!=0 else None
vpa = patrimonio / shares_outstanding if shares_outstanding!=0 else None

pl = price / lpa if lpa and lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa and vpa!=0 else None

ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None

marg_bruta = 3953483000.0 / receita_12 if receita_12!=0 else None
